content_fingerprint: llama cpp release adds opencl acceleration for iq4 nl quantized models the llama cpp project shipped opencl support for the iq4 nl quantization format in release b8935 extending hardware accelerated inference for this memory efficient scheme beyond cuda dependent gpus the llama cpp project published release b8935 on april 26 2026 adding three opencl backed changes for the iq4 nl quantization format via pull request 22272 general iq4 nl support on opencl gemm gemv kernels optimized for adreno gpus and a memory efficiency improvement that packs two lookup table entries into a single unsigned int
